summary: Verified Finance Suite navigation bug fix - All 6 module cards navigate correctly without blank pages. Sidebar navigation within each module works as expected.
passed_tests: Finance Entity Selector page loads at /finance with all 6 module cards visible
CLT Academy card navigates to /finance/clt/dashboard - Finance Layout rendered correctly
Miles Capitals card navigates to /finance/miles/dashboard - Finance Layout rendered correctly
Treasury card navigates to /finance/treasury/dashboard - Finance Layout rendered correctly
Budgeting card navigates to /finance/budgeting/sheet - Finance Layout rendered correctly
Overall PNL card navigates to /finance/pnl/dashboard - Finance Layout rendered correctly
Data Management card navigates to /finance/data/management - Finance Layout rendered correctly
Back to Finance Suite button returns to /finance selector page from all modules
Miles Capitals sidebar: Deposits, Withdrawals, Expenses, Operating Profit all navigate correctly
Treasury sidebar: Opening Balances, Pending Settlements navigate correctly
Budgeting sidebar: Budget Sheet, Budget Dashboard navigate correctly
CLT Academy sidebar: Payables, Receivables navigate correctly

bug_fix_verified.original_issue: Navigation was broken for most modules - clicking cards showed blank pages
fix_applied: Removed conflicting PNL route at lines 258-265 in App.js that created nested structure
Fixed treasury settlements route path from 'pending-settlements' to 'settlements' in App.js
bug_fix_verified.verification_result: All 6 modules now navigate correctly and render Finance Layout with proper sidebar

context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance Suite navigation fix has been verified. All 6 finance modules (CLT Academy, Miles Capitals, Treasury, Budgeting, Overall PNL, Data Management) navigate correctly from /finance selector page. Each module renders FinanceLayout with proper sidebar navigation. The fix involved removing a conflicting PNL route and correcting the treasury settlements path in App.js.
testing_method: Playwright browser automation with login authentication
